title: Integrating Twilio with Make/Zapier to see incoming SMS in Monday
excerpt: I can send an outgoing SMS to a customer from Monday via Twilio. However, if the customer replies via SMS, I’d like to view this in Monday. Has anyone successfully integrated Twilio with Make/Zapier to view customer SMS …

posts.author: sumeetmonday (Sumeet)
posts.cookedHtml: I can send an outgoing SMS to a customer from Monday via Twilio. However, if the customer replies via SMS, I’d like to view this in Monday. Has anyone successfully integrated Twilio with Make/Zapier to view customer SMS replies in Monday?
